---
title: "Elements"
description: "Assemble supported OPALX elements into a beamline."
audience: user
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

Elements are named objects assembled into a `LINE`. The current executable
registers drifts, bending and focusing magnets, RF structures, diagnostics,
lasers, markers, time-dependence objects, and specialized elements.

Element placement and field support are three-dimensional. Overlapping active
elements are handled by the orbit-threading and local-frame machinery rather
than by a single owner along the longitudinal coordinate.

Use the [Element Reference](../reference/elements.qmd) for the source-derived
inventory and the [Element Physics](../physics/elements/index.qmd) chapter for
models that require detailed derivations and benchmarks.
